mapper.select:
SELECT ID,CNDN_CODE, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE, TAXATION_INVOICE, CNDN_BILL_TYPE_CODE, CNDN_BILL_TYPE_NAME, INVOICE_CODE, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, SYS_INVOICE_CODE, ELIMINATE_AMOUNT, REMARK, CNDN_TYPE, STATUS, VOID_REASON, DEBTORPAYMENT_ID,VOID_REMARK,CNDN_TIME, IS_DEBTOR_PAYMENT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME,INVOICE FROM T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL( ID, CNDN_CODE, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE, TAXATION_INVOICE, CNDN_BILL_TYPE_CODE, CNDN_BILL_TYPE_NAME, INVOICE_CODE, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, SYS_INVOICE_CODE, ELIMINATE_AMOUNT, REMARK, CNDN_TYPE, CNDN_TIME, STATUS, VOID_REASON, VOID_REMARK, IS_DEBTOR_PAYMENT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, HAS_NOT_RECEIPT_AMOUNT, RECEIPT_STATUS )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cndnCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxationInvoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxationInvoice, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cndnBillTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cndnBillTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sysInvoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eliminateAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cndnType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cndnTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voidReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voidRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDebtorPayment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{prepaymentTypeCode}, #{hasNotReceiptAmount}, 10 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CNDN_CODE = #{cndnCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE = #{taxationInvoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAXATION_INVOICE = #{taxationInvoice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CNDN_BILL_TYPE_CODE = #{cndnBillTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CNDN_BILL_TYPE_NAME = #{cndnBillTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_CODE = #{invoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYS_INVOICE_CODE = #{sysInvoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ELIMINATE_AMOUNT = #{eliminateAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CNDN_TYPE = #{cndnType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CNDN_TIME = #{cndnTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOID_REASON = #{voidReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOID_REMARK = #{voidRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_DEBTOR_PAYMENT = #{isDebtorPayment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
update T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL set INVOICE_CODE = #{infoTypeCode}, MACHINE_INVOICE_NUM = #{machineInvoiceNum}, PDF_URL = #{pdfurl}, PDF_MSG = #{pdfmsg} where CNDN_CODE = #{number}
mapper.select:
SELECT MAX(CNDN_CODE) FROM T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL WHERE
CNDN_CODE LIKE #{startWith,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOID_REASON = #{voidReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOID_REMARK = #{voidRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: select TBR.ID, TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE, TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME, TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, TBR.PROCESS_CODE, TBR.PROCESS_NAME, TBR.CARGO_CODE, TBR.CARGO_NAME, TBR.INTE_FORE, TBR.RATE, TBR.TAX_RATE, TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1, TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2, TBR.START_DATE, TBR.END_DATE, CASE WHEN TBR.DATA_SOURCE = '1' THEN CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME,DECODE(TBR.PROCESS_NAME,NULL,'','('||TBR.PROCESS_NAME||')')),':'),TO_CHAR(tbr.rate,'99999990.9999')) ELSE TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME || '-' || TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME || '-' || DECODE(TBR.CARGO_NAME,NULL,'',TBR.CARGO_NAME) || ':' || TO_CHAR(tbr.rate,'99999990.9999') END AS RATE_ITEM_AND_RATE, TBR.DATA_SOURCE from T_BUS_RATE TBR
